# pip-audit ignore list — tracked CVEs with no upstream fix yet.
#
# Re-evaluate this list quarterly. When torch ships fixes, drop the matching
# entries and tighten the lower bound in pyproject.toml instead.
#
# Format: one PYSEC ID per line. Lines starting with `#` are comments.

# torch 2.12.0 — all upstream-confirmed but unfixed as of 2026-05.
# Triage: each CVE requires the attacker to feed adversarial inputs into a
# specific torch API (jit, profiler, lstm_cell, rnn utils, mkldnn pool,
# quantization, cuda allocator, pt2 loader). OpenLithoHub does not expose any
# of these APIs to untrusted inputs — masks come from local files / trusted
# datasets, not network sources. Risk is acceptable until torch ships fixes.
PYSEC-2025-189
PYSEC-2025-190
PYSEC-2025-191
PYSEC-2025-192
PYSEC-2025-193
PYSEC-2025-194
PYSEC-2025-195
PYSEC-2025-196
PYSEC-2025-197
PYSEC-2025-210
PYSEC-2026-139
